markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content performance, refine strategy, and address process issues.](https://fathom.video/share/yusWx8rdji83AQKDVuv58G3YhP_aLiTS?tab=summary&timestamp=1488.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Performance Gap:** Content is not driving expected lower-funnel impact, with AI-driven conversions growing too slowly. Only one new article has entered the top 20 in four months, raising concerns about ROI.](https://fathom.video/share/yusWx8rdji83AQKDVuv58G3YhP_aLiTS?tab=summary&timestamp=1517.0)
  - [**Strategic Pivot:** Relay is considering a pivot to a home services audience. The key debate is which content formats drive AI visibility in financial services—listicles (GrowthX) or definitional guides (Relay).](https://fathom.video/share/yusWx8rdji83AQKDVuv58G3YhP_aLiTS?tab=summary&timestamp=821.0)
  - [**Process Fixes:** GrowthX will fix two pipeline issues: inconsistent tone drift and flawed linking logic that uses outdated, unapproved content. Relay will now tag Fatima (Managing Editor) for day-to-day feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/yusWx8rdji83AQKDVuv58G3YhP_aLiTS?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance & ROI

  - [**Problem:** Content isn't driving expected business impact, specifically lower-funnel conversions.](https://fathom.video/share/yusWx8rdji83AQKDVuv58G3YhP_aLiTS?tab=summary&timestamp=1517.0)
  - [**Metrics:**](https://fathom.video/share/yusWx8rdji83AQKDVuv58G3YhP_aLiTS?tab=summary&timestamp=1528.0)
      - [Organic traffic is up, but conversion growth is disproportionately slow.](https://fathom.video/share/yusWx8rdji83AQKDVuv58G3YhP_aLiTS?tab=summary&timestamp=1528.0)
      - [AI-driven conversions are growing, but not at the expected rate.](https://fathom.video/share/yusWx8rdji83AQKDVuv58G3YhP_aLiTS?tab=summary&timestamp=1687.0)
      - [Only one new article has entered the top 20 in four months.](https://fathom.video/share/yusWx8rdji83AQKDVuv58G3YhP_aLiTS?tab=summary&timestamp=1876.0)
  - [**Data:** Relay tracks conversion via weekly reports and a checkout survey.](https://fathom.video/share/yusWx8rdji83AQKDVuv58G3YhP_aLiTS?tab=summary&timestamp=1609.0)
  - [**Action:** GrowthX will define data needs to connect content performance to Relay's conversion metrics. Relay will provide a specific conversion goal for the content program.](https://fathom.video/share/yusWx8rdji83AQKDVuv58G3YhP_aLiTS?tab=summary&timestamp=1721.0)

### Content Strategy Pivot: Home Services

  - [GrowthX presented a modular home services strategy, allowing for a full pivot, a test (e.g., 50% of monthly articles), or an expansion.](https://fathom.video/share/yusWx8rdji83AQKDVuv58G3YhP_aLiTS?tab=summary&timestamp=857.0)
  - [**Content Format Debate:**](https://fathom.video/share/yusWx8rdji83AQKDVuv58G3YhP_aLiTS?tab=summary&timestamp=1266.0)
      - [**GrowthX:** Listicles and comparisons are top performers for AI visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/yusWx8rdji83AQKDVuv58G3YhP_aLiTS?tab=summary&timestamp=1266.0)
      - [**Relay:** Definitional content is safer and more authoritative for financial services, which LLMs prefer to minimize liability.](https://fathom.video/share/yusWx8rdji83AQKDVuv58G3YhP_aLiTS?tab=summary&timestamp=1351.0)
  - [**Decision:** GrowthX will provide a list of all possible article formats with examples and a recommended mix.](https://fathom.video/share/yusWx8rdji83AQKDVuv58G3YhP_aLiTS?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)

### Content Quality & Process

  - [**Tone Drift:** The new, lighter tone is an improvement but inconsistent. The "painting a picture" style persists in some articles.](https://fathom.video/share/yusWx8rdji83AQKDVuv58G3YhP_aLiTS?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)
      - [**Mitigation:** Bailey will spot-check more often. Relay can flag specific content categories for higher scrutiny.](https://fathom.video/share/yusWx8rdji83AQKDVuv58G3YhP_aLiTS?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
  - [**Linking Logic:** The pipeline uses outdated internal and external links.](https://fathom.video/share/yusWx8rdji83AQKDVuv58G3YhP_aLiTS?tab=summary&timestamp=676.0)
      - [**Risk:** Older internal links lack compliance approval. Outdated external links (7-8 years old) are often irrelevant.](https://fathom.video/share/yusWx8rdji83AQKDVuv58G3YhP_aLiTS?tab=summary&timestamp=676.0)
      - [**Fix:** GrowthX will update the pipeline to prioritize new, approved content and build a separate artifact for priority links.](https://fathom.video/share/yusWx8rdji83AQKDVuv58G3YhP_aLiTS?tab=summary&timestamp=736.0)
  - [**Editorial Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/yusWx8rdji83AQKDVuv58G3YhP_aLiTS?tab=summary&timestamp=477.0)
      - [Fatima is the dedicated Managing Editor for the account, responsible for day-to-day edits.](https://fathom.video/share/yusWx8rdji83AQKDVuv58G3YhP_aLiTS?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)
      - [**Action:** Relay will tag Fatima for daily feedback and Bailey for pattern-level issues.](https://fathom.video/share/yusWx8rdji83AQKDVuv58G3YhP_aLiTS?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX (Bailey):**](https://fathom.video/share/yusWx8rdji83AQKDVuv58G3YhP_aLiTS?tab=summary&timestamp=736.0)
      - [Fix the pipeline's linking logic to prioritize new, approved content.](https://fathom.video/share/yusWx8rdji83AQKDVuv58G3YhP_aLiTS?tab=summary&timestamp=736.0)
      - [Provide a list of article formats with examples and a recommended mix.](https://fathom.video/share/yusWx8rdji83AQKDVuv58G3YhP_aLiTS?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)
      - [Define data requirements to connect content performance to Relay's conversion metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/yusWx8rdji83AQKDVuv58G3YhP_aLiTS?tab=summary&timestamp=1721.0)
  - [**Relay (Bethany):**](https://fathom.video/share/yusWx8rdji83AQKDVuv58G3YhP_aLiTS?tab=summary&timestamp=1423.0)
      - [Review the home services strategy doc and add comments.](https://fathom.video/share/yusWx8rdji83AQKDVuv58G3YhP_aLiTS?tab=summary&timestamp=1423.0)
      - [Get a specific conversion goal for the content program from Nick (VP).](https://fathom.video/share/yusWx8rdji83AQKDVuv58G3YhP_aLiTS?tab=summary&timestamp=1754.0)
      - [Provide requested conversion data to GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/yusWx8rdji83AQKDVuv58G3YhP_aLiTS?tab=summary&timestamp=1609.0)
